PowerShell($docx = "c:\\Users\\Nikolay\\Desktop\\su\\J3U materials\\Client-Assessment-form.docx"; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($docx\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $xml -replace '<[^>]+>','' -replace '&','&' -replace '<','<' -replace '>','>' | Select-String -Pattern '\\S' | Select-Object -First 100 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $docx = "c:\\Users\\Nikolay\\Desktop\\su\\J3U materials\\Client-Assessment-form.docx"; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($docx\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); \($xml -replace '<[^>]+>','' -replace '&','&' -replace '<','<' -replace '>','>'\) -split '\\s+' | Where-Object { $_ -ne '' } | Select-Object -First 500 | Out-String)
